explanation: This command uses base64 encoding to execute a Set-MpPreference command with an exclusion path. It is a direct mutation of the original command by re-encoding the same string with minor formatting changes.
This command uses the -Command parameter instead of -EncodedCommand to execute the same logic in plain text. It is a safe mutation that omits encoding and uses plain command syntax.
This command uses the short form of -Command (-c) and omits quotes around the path. It is a valid mutation that preserves the original behavior.
This command is a re-encoded version of the original command with minor whitespace or formatting differences. It is a safe mutation that still matches the Sigma rule.
